Notes.Text:
This update for libjxl fixes the following issue:

- CVE-2024-11498: Resource exhaustion via Stack overflow in libjxl (bsc#1233785).
Notes.Title: Details

Vulnerabilities.Description: There exists a stack buffer overflow in libjxl.  A specifically-crafted file can cause the JPEG XL decoder to use large amounts of stack space (up to 256mb is possible, maybe 512mb), potentially exhausting the stack. An attacker can craft a file that will cause excessive memory usage. We recommend upgrading past commit  65fbec56bc578b6b6ee02a527be70787bbd053b0.
